title: AutoMessageSystem
description: Full auto-message system! Chat, BossBar, Title and ActionBar! PlaceholderAPI support!
body:
![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/30d320ae615c4888b95a49ec62032266e49e673e.gif)

AutoMessageSystem is a plugin allowing you to set up auto-messages with BossBar, Title, ActionBar or chat! PlaceholderAPI is supported!

- ➟ Discord for issues/help : [https://discord.gg/xyness](https://discord.gg/6sRTGprM95)
- ➟ Documentation : https://xyness.gitbook.io/automessagesystem/
- ➟ Source code : https://github.com/Xyness/AutoMessageSystem

- ⚙️ Fully configurable
- ⚡ Folia supported (Optimized and lightweight)
- ✅ PlaceholderAPI support
